---
title: "Robotic Functions"
---

### Setting up the Robot
To set up the Aquagator robot, follow these steps:
1. Unpack the robot and ensure all components are present.
2. Connect sensor box to color-corresponding codes on the robot.
3. Connect the red box to the power supply.
4. Ensure that the depth sensor is connected and turned on.
5. Ensure that the robot's motors are free from the sensor connection cords.
6. Connect red box to the computer using the provided USB cable.
